messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Build a PowerPoint presentation titled 'Cybersecurity Awareness Training' for company employees across all departments. The deck needs 10 slides designed with a high-contrast dark and light theme to emphasize important warnings. Write all content in Japanese and configure the slide size to 4:3 Standard orientation. Save it as cyber_training.pptx. You are not allowed to use external APIs or web scraping. When adding charts, you must explicitly use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Furthermore, any attempt to set text on a title shape must first check if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

DARK_BG = "#1a1a2e"
DARK_BG_ALT = "#16213e"
LIGHT_CARD = "#ffffff"
LIGHT_CARD_ALT = "#f8f9fa"
ACCENT_RED = "#e74c3c"
ACCENT_BLUE = "#3498db"
WHITE_TEXT = "#ffffff"
GRAY_TEXT = "#bdc3c7"
DARK_GRAY = "#2d3436"
LIGHT_ACCENT = "#0f3460"

FONT_PRIMARY = "Aptos"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Calibri"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    h = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_PRIMARY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    else:
        run.font.color.rgb = WHITE_TEXT
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color=LIGHT_CARD, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, left, top):
    label_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, Inches(0.15), Inches(0.6))
    label_shape.fill.solid()
    label_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_RED)
    label_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top - Inches(0.02), Inches(4), Inches(0.6), text, font_size=14, bold=True, color=ACCENT_RED)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.3), f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=10, color=GRAY_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_CARD_ALT)
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_BLUE)
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(2)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.2), height - Inches(0.6), "画像", font_size=14, color=ACCENT_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def slide_1_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, DARK_BG)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(9), Inches(1.5), "サイバーセキュリティ意識向上トレーニング", font_size=40, bold=True, color=WHITE_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.0), Inches(9), Inches(0.8), "全社員対象 — 組織のセキュリティを守るための基礎知識", font_size=22, color=GRAY_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(4), Inches(4.1), Inches(2), Inches(0.05))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_RED)
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(4.6), Inches(9), Inches(0.5), "2025年度版", font_size=16, color=GRAY_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def slide_2_agenda(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, DARK_BG_ALT)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "トレーニングの目次"
        for run in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE_TEXT)
            run.font.size = Pt(32)
            run.font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.4), Inches(9), Inches(0.8), "トレーニングの目次", font_size=32, bold=True, color=WHITE_TEXT)

    items = [
        ("1", "サイバーセキュリティとは"),
        ("2", "フィッシング詐欺への対応"),
        ("3", "パスワード管理の基本"),
        ("4", "ソーシャルエンジニアリング対策"),
        ("5", "マルウェア・ランサムウェアの脅威"),
        ("6", "機密情報の取り扱い"),
    ]

    for i, (num, text) in enumerate(items):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = Inches(0.8 + col * 4.5)
        y = Inches(1.6 + row * 1.3)

        card = add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(4), Inches(1.1), bg_color=DARK_BG, border_color=ACCENT_BLUE)
        num_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.35), Inches(0.5), Inches(0.5))
        num_shape.fill.solid()
        num_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_BLUE)
        num_shape.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.38), Inches(0.5), Inches(0.45), num, font_size=18, bold=True, color=WHITE_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.9), y + Inches(0.35), Inches(2.8), Inches(0.5), text, font_size=16, color=WHITE_TEXT)


def slide_3_stats(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, DARK_BG)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "なぜサイバーセキュリティが必要なのか"
        for run in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE_TEXT)
            run.font.size = Pt(32)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.4), Inches(9), Inches(0.8), "なぜサイバーセキュリティが必要なのか", font_size=32, bold=True, color=WHITE_TEXT)

    stats = [
        ("72%", "の企業が\nフィッシング被害に遭った"),
        ("65%", "がパスワード再利用を\n行っている"),
        ("43%", "の攻撃が中小企業を\n標的にしている"),
        ("平均$4.4M", "ランサムウェア被害の\n平均コスト（米ドル）"),
    ]

    for i, (stat, desc) in enumerate(stats):
        x = Inches(0.5 + i * 2.35)
        y = Inches(1.6)
        card = add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(2.1), Inches(2.8), bg_color=DARK_BG_ALT, border_color=ACCENT_RED)

        stat_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.3), Inches(1.8), Inches(0.06))
        stat_shape.fill.solid()
        stat_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_RED)
        stat_shape.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.5), Inches(1.7), Inches(0.8), stat, font_size=36, bold=True, color=ACCENT_RED, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(1.4), Inches(1.8), Inches(1.2), desc, font_size=13, color=GRAY_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 3, 10)


def slide_4_phishing(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, DARK_BG_ALT)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "フィッシング詐欺への対応"
        for run in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE_TEXT)
            run.font.size = Pt(32)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.4), Inches(9), Inches(0.8), "フィッシング詐欺への対応", font_size=32, bold=True, color=WHITE_TEXT)

    left_card = add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.6), Inches(4.5), Inches(5.2), bg_color=DARK_BG, border_color=ACCENT_BLUE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.8), Inches(3.9), Inches(0.5), "フィッシングメールの特徴", font_size=20, bold=True, color=ACCENT_RED)

    features = [
        "差出人のメールアドレスが不自然",
        "緊急性を煽る表現が含まれる",
        "リンク先URLが正規と異なる",
        "添付ファイルの開封を求める",
        "個人情報やパスワードの入力を要求",
    ]
    for i, feat in enumerate(features):
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(2.5 + i * 0.7), Inches(3.9), Inches(0.6), f"• {feat}", font_size=14, color=GRAY_TEXT)

    right_card = add_card(slide, Inches(5.5), Inches(1.6), Inches(4), Inches(2.8), bg_color=DARK_BG, border_color=ACCENT_RED)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.7), Inches(1.8), Inches(3.6), Inches(0.5), "⚠ 注意すべきメール例", font_size=16, bold=True, color=ACCENT_RED)

    example = (
        "件名: 【重要】アカウントの停止について\n"
        "差出人: support@your-company-security.com\n"
        "本文: アカウントに不審なアクセスが検出されました。\n"
        "以下のリンクからパスワードを再設定してください。"
    )
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.7), Inches(2.4), Inches(3.6), Inches(1.8), example, font_size=11, color=GRAY_TEXT)

    action_card = add_card(slide, Inches(5.5), Inches(4.7), Inches(4), Inches(2.1), bg_color=DARK_BG, border_color=ACCENT_BLUE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.7), Inches(4.9), Inches(3.6), Inches(0.5), "対応方法", font_size=16, bold=True, color=ACCENT_BLUE)

    actions = [
        "リンクや添付ファイルを開かない",
        "差出人を直接確認する",
        "IT部門に報告する",
    ]
    for i, act in enumerate(actions):
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.7), Inches(5.4 + i * 0.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(0.4), f"✓ {act}", font_size=13, color=WHITE_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 4, 10)


def slide_5_passwords(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, DARK_BG)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "パスワード管理の基本"
        for run in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE_TEXT)
            run.font.size = Pt(32)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.4), Inches(9), Inches(0.8), "パスワード管理の基本", font_size=32, bold=True, color=WHITE_TEXT)

    tips = [
        ("12文字以上", "長いパスワードほど\n安全性が高い"),
        ("複雑さ", "大文字・小文字・数字・\n記号を組み合わせる"),
        ("使い回し禁止", "異なるサービスで\n同じパスワードを使わない"),
        ("MFA活用", "多要素認証を必ず有効にする"),
    ]

    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(tips):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = Inches(0.5 + col * 4.7)
        y = Inches(1.6 + row * 2.8)

        card = add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(4.3), Inches(2.4), bg_color=DARK_BG_ALT, border_color=ACCENT_BLUE)
        num_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.25), y + Inches(0.25), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.6))
        num_shape.fill.solid()
        num_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_BLUE)
        num_shape.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.25), y + Inches(0.3), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5), str(i + 1), font_size=24, bold=True, color=WHITE_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(1.1), y + Inches(0.3), Inches(3), Inches(0.5), title, font_size=20, bold=True, color=ACCENT_BLUE)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.4), y + Inches(1.0), Inches(3.5), Inches(1.2), desc, font_size=14, color=GRAY_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 5, 10)


def slide_6_social_engineering(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, DARK_BG_ALT)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "ソーシャルエンジニアリング対策"
        for run in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE_TEXT)
            run.font.size = Pt(32)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.4), Inches(9), Inches(0.8), "ソーシャルエンジニアリング対策", font_size=32, bold=True, color=WHITE_TEXT)

    left_card = add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.6), Inches(4.5), Inches(5.2), bg_color=DARK_BG, border_color=ACCENT_RED)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.8), Inches(3.9), Inches(0.5), "よくある手口", font_size=20, bold=True, color=ACCENT_RED)

    tactics = [
        ("電話詐欺", "IT担当者を装い、パスワードを要求"),
        ("ビジネスメール詐欺", "CEOを装った金銭送付の依頼"),
        ("USBドロップ攻撃", "オフィスにUSBメモリを故意に紛失させる"),
        ("尾行・スキャンニング", "オフィスの情報を収集する"),
    ]

    for i, (name, desc) in enumerate(tactics):
        y = Inches(2.5 + i * 1.0)
        dot_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(0.8), y + Inches(0.1), Inches(0.3), Inches(0.3))
        dot_shape.fill.solid()
        dot_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_RED)
        dot_shape.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.25), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(3.4), Inches(0.4), name, font_size=16, bold=True, color=WHITE_TEXT)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.25), y + Inches(0.4), Inches(3.4), Inches(0.5), desc, font_size=13, color=GRAY_TEXT)

    right_card = add_card(slide, Inches(5.5), Inches(1.6), Inches(4), Inches(5.2), bg_color=DARK_BG, border_color=ACCENT_BLUE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.7), Inches(1.8), Inches(3.6), Inches(0.5), "防御のポイント", font_size=20, bold=True, color=ACCENT_BLUE)

    defenses = [
        "本人確認を徹底する",
        "不審な電話はかけ直す",
        "見知らぬUSBは挿さない",
        "個人情報へのアクセス制限",
        "定期的なトレーニング実施",
    ]

    for i, def_item in enumerate(defenses):
        y = Inches(2.5 + i * 0.8)
        check_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(5.7), y + Inches(0.1), Inches(0.35), Inches(0.35))
        check_shape.fill.solid()
        check_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_BLUE)
        check_shape.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.2), y + Inches(0.1), Inches(3.0), Inches(0.5), def_item, font_size=14, color=WHITE_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 6, 10)


def slide_7_malware(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, DARK_BG)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "マルウェア・ランサムウェアの脅威"
        for run in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE_TEXT)
            run.font.size = Pt(32)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.4), Inches(9), Inches(0.8), "マルウェア・ランサムウェアの脅威", font_size=32, bold=True, color=WHITE_TEXT)

    malware_types = [
        ("ウイルス", "他のプログラムに感染し、\nシステムを破壊する"),
        ("ワーム", "ネットワーク経由で\n自己複製して拡散"),
        ("トロイの木馬", "正当なソフトウェアと\n偽装して侵入"),
        ("スパイウェア", "キーロガーなどで\n個人情報を盗む"),
    ]

    for i, (name, desc) in enumerate(malware_types):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = Inches(0.5 + col * 4.7)
        y = Inches(1.6 + row * 2.8)

        card = add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(4.3), Inches(2.4), bg_color=DARK_BG_ALT, border_color=ACCENT_RED)
        icon_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.CROSS, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.3), Inches(0.5), Inches(0.5))
        icon_shape.fill.solid()
        icon_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_RED)
        icon_shape.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(1.0), y + Inches(0.3), Inches(3.0), Inches(0.5), name, font_size=20, bold=True, color=ACCENT_RED)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.4), y + Inches(1.0), Inches(3.5), Inches(1.2), desc, font_size=14, color=GRAY_TEXT)

    ransom_card = add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(6.0), Inches(9), Inches(1.0), bg_color=DARK_BG_ALT, border_color=ACCENT_RED)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(6.2), Inches(8.4), Inches(0.6), "ランサムウェア: データを暗号化し、身代金を要求する攻撃 — 定期的なバックアップが唯一の対策", font_size=15, bold=True, color=ACCENT_RED)

    add_footer(slide, 7, 10)


def slide_8_data_protection(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, DARK_BG_ALT)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "機密情報の取り扱い"
        for run in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE_TEXT)
            run.font.size = Pt(32)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.4), Inches(9), Inches(0.8), "機密情報の取り扱い", font_size=32, bold=True, color=WHITE_TEXT)

    rules = [
        ("分類とラベリング", "機密・社内限定・公開など\n情報レベルを明確にする"),
        ("アクセス制御", "必要な人だけがアクセス\nできる権限設定を行う"),
        ("暗号化", "送信時・保存時に\nデータを暗号化する"),
        ("廃棄処理", "不要なデータは確実に\n削除・破壊する"),
    ]

    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(rules):
        x = Inches(0.5 + i * 2.35)
        y = Inches(1.6)

        card = add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(2.1), Inches(4.8), bg_color=DARK_BG, border_color=ACCENT_BLUE)

        num_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.75), y + Inches(0.3), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.6))
        num_shape.fill.solid()
        num_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_BLUE)
        num_shape.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.75), y + Inches(0.35), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5), str(i + 1), font_size=24, bold=True, color=WHITE_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(1.1), Inches(1.7), Inches(0.6), title, font_size=18, bold=True, color=ACCENT_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(1.9), Inches(1.7), Inches(2.5), desc, font_size=13, color=GRAY_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 8, 10)


def slide_9_incident_response(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, DARK_BG)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "インシデント発生時の対応"
        for run in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE_TEXT)
            run.font.size = Pt(32)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.4), Inches(9), Inches(0.8), "インシデント発生時の対応", font_size=32, bold=True, color=WHITE_TEXT)

    steps = [
        ("1", "発見・報告", "不審な動作やメールを発見したら\n直ちにIT部門に連絡する"),
        ("2", "隔離", "感染したPCはネットワークから\n切断し、使用を停止する"),
        ("3", "調査", "IT部門が被害範囲と原因を\n特定する"),
        ("4", "復旧", "バックアップからの復元や\nセキュリティパッチ適用を行う"),
    ]

    for i, (num, title, desc) in enumerate(steps):
        x = Inches(0.5 + i * 2.35)
        y = Inches(1.6)

        card = add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(2.1), Inches(4.8), bg_color=DARK_BG_ALT, border_color=ACCENT_RED)

        num_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.75), y + Inches(0.3), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.6))
        num_shape.fill.solid()
        num_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_RED)
        num_shape.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.75), y + Inches(0.35), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5), num, font_size=24, bold=True, color=WHITE_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        arrow_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.DOWN_ARROW, x + Inches(0.78), y + Inches(1.0), Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3))
        arrow_shape.fill.solid()
        arrow_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_RED)
        arrow_shape.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(1.4), Inches(1.7), Inches(0.5), title, font_size=18, bold=True, color=WHITE_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(2.1), Inches(1.7), Inches(2.4), desc, font_size=13, color=GRAY_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    contact_card = add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(6.8), Inches(9), Inches(0.5), bg_color=DARK_BG_ALT, border_color=ACCENT_BLUE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(6.85), Inches(8.4), Inches(0.4), "緊急連絡先: ITヘルプデスク（内線 1234） | security@company.co.jp", font_size=14, bold=True, color=ACCENT_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 9, 10)


def slide_10_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, DARK_BG_ALT)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "まとめ — 全員でセキュリティを守る"
        for run in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE_TEXT)
            run.font.size = Pt(32)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.4), Inches(9), Inches(0.8), "まとめ — 全員でセキュリティを守る", font_size=32, bold=True, color=WHITE_TEXT)

    takeaways = [
        "フィッシングメールは必ず確認する",
        "パスワードは複雑に、使い回ししない",
        "不審な電話やメールには注意する",
        "マルウェア対策ソフトを常に有効にする",
        "機密情報は適切に扱う・廃棄する",
        "インシデントは即座に報告する",
    ]

    for i, item in enumerate(takeaways):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = Inches(0.5 + col * 4.7)
        y = Inches(1.6 + row * 1.3)

        card = add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(4.3), Inches(1.1), bg_color=DARK_BG, border_color=ACCENT_BLUE)
        check_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.35), Inches(0.4), Inches(0.4))
        check_shape.fill.solid()
        check_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_BLUE)
        check_shape.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.7), y + Inches(0.35), Inches(3.4), Inches(0.4), item, font_size=16, color=WHITE_TEXT)

    closing_card = add_card(slide, Inches(2), Inches(6.0), Inches(6), Inches(1.0), bg_color=DARK_BG, border_color=ACCENT_RED)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.3), Inches(6.2), Inches(5.4), Inches(0.6), "セキュリティは一人ひとりの意識が大切です", font_size=20, bold=True, color=ACCENT_RED, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 10, 10)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_1_title(prs)
    slide_2_agenda(prs)
    slide_3_stats(prs)
    slide_4_phishing(prs)
    slide_5_passwords(prs)
    slide_6_social_engineering(prs)
    slide_7_malware(prs)
    slide_8_data_protection(prs)
    slide_9_incident_response(prs)
    slide_10_summary(prs)

    prs.save("cyber_training.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
